Executive Summary BSS Risk Assessment is conducted during M+12 to M+15 across all Legal entities, Segment & Group. From M+12 to M+ 15, follow up is done and the tracker updating happens. ➢ Manual consolidation of the BSS Risk Assessment by different categories – substantiated at risk, unsubstantiated unowned, unsubstantiated owned. ➢ Manual follow up and consolidation of manual submissions post FCA cutoff. Triggers escalation of the unsubstantiated via emails. ➢ Current reporting does not have a caption view/ segment view/ legal entity view and is needed for the country reporting, risk forums and audit committee forums. ➢ Additional manual efforts spent on above activities. AI agent assists users by highlighting high-risk GL accounts, suggesting risk ratings and proposing justification based on analysis of reconciliation data, adjustment activity inside the FC App and transaction data in general ledger. It detects anomalies

spent on above activities. AI agent assists users by highlighting high-risk GL accounts, suggesting risk ratings and proposing justification based on analysis of reconciliation data, adjustment activity inside the FC App and transaction data in general ledger. It detects anomalies in balances, ageing, recurring adjustments, historical trends or policy thresholds. enabling faster and more informed financial control decisions. The BSS risk assessment is a critical Financial reporting (risk) process used for CFO attestation as well as Risk /Audit committee reporting, and thereby it is critical for automation. At least 10 to 12 FTEs efforts is spent during M+12 to M+15, which is equivalent to 1 FTE saves. AI Architect & AI Engineer from SCB AI Studios required to spent <100 days to build this AI model, along with GPM, Process lead, SME & PPE lead for at least 10 to 15 days equivalent efforts for Business Requirements, designing process models, validating the solutions created and perform testing to confirm results. Problem/Opportunity statement ## Current state: • BSS Risk Assessment analysis with commentaries for 234 Les & Group is performed during M+12 to M+15 days & shared with CFOs, Risk Forums and Audit committee (Refer VISIO process map for detailed steps) • Highly manual process, with considerable time spent on consolidation on risk assessed file at a group level at legal entity to create a consolidated group view. • Manually updating unsubstantiated report daily (M+13 to M+15) to reflect the manual submissions received post FCA cutoffs. • Manual time spent on preparing the risk reporting packs. ## Business impact: • Improved and efficient risk reporting across CFO, Risk forum and audit committee. • 1 FTE manual efforts reduction in BSS Risk Assessment process • Enhanced UKACG reporting and risk monitoring. ## Drivers for Change: • In house AI solutions • AI teams availability • Solution feasibility • Deployment timelines & • No additional cost for AI solutions (esp. no cost for LLM, Tokens, AI team) 3. Project Description ## Proposed Solution: AI agent assists users by highlighting high-risk GL accounts, suggesting risk ratings and proposing justification based on analysis of reconciliation data, adjustment activity inside the FC App and transaction data in general ledger. It detects anomalies in balances, ageing, recurring adjustments, historical trends or policy thresholds. enabling faster and more informed financial control decisions. Project Objectives • Optimisation of process to improve the process maturity levels • E2E process automation including Risk Assessment & identification of material items • Building block to create SCB Finance LLM Scope • In scope – BSS Risk Assessment • Out of scope – FORTM, BSS Reconciliations Key deliverables • AI automation on BSS Risk Assessment 4. Executive Summary Trial Balance review is conducted during M+1 to M+7 across all Legal entities, Segment & Group, to understand the variance & balance movements between periods. Deep dives to assess the events, transactions causing the variances and reasons behind them. Analysed with detailed commentaries for these movements are prepared & submitted to Group for further review & used for Country CFO packs/Legal entity reporting. Downloading Trail balance from PSGL/S4 & preparing the detailed analysis across all 234 LEs are highly time consuming, current view is at Legal entity level and need to be in Finance caption level & segment level. Considerable time spent during month end close days and limiting the time for deep dives & detailed analysis An AI model produces business insights and written commentaries (Finance reporting caption Level & Segment Level with Legal entity

& segment level. Considerable time spent during month end close days and limiting the time for deep dives & detailed analysis An AI model produces business insights and written commentaries (Finance reporting caption Level & Segment Level with Legal entity view) based on the analysis performed on general ledger transaction data that detects anomalies, trends, unusual movements, new accounts, spikes/drops vs prior periods, and material balances. GCFO teams get a narrative summary instead of just numbers, accelerating review and improving decision-making. Template should have multiple user access for further inputs/review. At least 20 to 25 FTEs spent on an average 4 hrs a day during M-2 to M+5, which is equivalent to ~5 FTE saves, with strengthening controls by eliminating manual process and reducing the overall book close timelines enabling Fast close. AI Architect & AI Engineer from SCB AI Studios required to spent <100 days to build this AI model, along with GPM, Process lead, SME & PPE lead for at least 10 to 15 days equivalent efforts for Business Requirements, designing process models, validating the solutions created and perform testing to confirm results. Problem/Opportunity statement ## Current state: • Trial Balance variance analysis with commentaries for 234 LEs, Segments & Group is performed during M+1 to M+7 days & shared with Group team for review. (Refer ARIS process map for detailed steps) • Currently it is only with reporting dimension of Legal Entity and team manually prepares Finance caption level reporting which takes considerable time on data extraction & preparation of reports rather than Analysis & insightful commentaries • Over all delays in reporting process to Group as well as Countries • Current state is not ready for moving into daily controls ## Business impact: • 20 to 25 FTEs manual efforts reduction in Trial Balance preparation & review during M+1 to M+7 • Hurdle to achieve overall reporting timelines • Manual process leading to EUCs & related maintenance; manual handoffs leading to continuous monitoring of controls, enhanced automated controls from UK ACG perspective • Foundation for future daily-control operating model, enabling real-time financial insight. ##

achieve overall reporting timelines • Manual process leading to EUCs & related maintenance; manual handoffs leading to continuous monitoring of controls, enhanced automated controls from UK ACG perspective • Foundation for future daily-control operating model, enabling real-time financial insight. ## Drivers for Change: • In house AI solutions • AI teams availability • Solution feasibility • Deployment timelines & • No/minimal additional cost for AI solutions & maintenance (esp. no cost for LLM, Tokens, AI team) 3. Project Description ## Proposed Solution: An AI model produces business insights and written commentaries in the trial balance review views based on the analysis performed on general ledger transaction data that detects anomalies, trends, unusual movements, new accounts, spikes/drops vs prior periods, and material balances. GCFO teams get a narrative summary instead of just numbers, accelerating review and improving decision-making.
